allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '3939|next dev' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; "stopped")

PowerShell($end=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(50\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r=$null; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3940" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 } catch {} } until \($r.StatusCode -eq 200 -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $end\); if\($r\){ "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "FAQ: $\($r.Content -match 'Frequently asked'\)"; "DOMAIN: $\($r.Content -match 'perfect domain'\)"; "PLANS: $\($r.Content -match 'Recommended'\)" } else { "no response" })
